title: helichrysum traversii
intro: Helichrysum traversii, a lesser-known species of the Helichrysum genus, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum traversii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum traversii often include essential oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
